summary: Health Monitor — surface PII classifier latency metrics
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want the Connector Health Monitor to expose PII classifier latency metrics so that I can identify performance bottlenecks in data processing pipelines and proactively optimize connector configurations.

## Background

The Connector Health Monitor (F-A3) provides visibility into connector operational health across all configured data sources. This enhancement integrates latency telemetry from the PII Auto-Tagging feature (F-B1), enabling workspace admins to correlate classification performance with overall connector health and tenant-specific workload patterns.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Health Monitor dashboard displays PII classifier latency (p50, p95, p99) per connector in milliseconds
2. Latency metrics are updated with a maximum 5-minute delay from actual measurement
3. Workspace admins can filter latency data by tenant, connector, and time range (last 24h, 7d, 30d)
4. Alerts can be configured when PII classifier latency exceeds a configurable threshold (default: 2000ms)

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: QA passed — verified p99 latency display and filtering across 3 test tenants. Ready for release.
